cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous call.

cwd.description: Optional cwd filter; when set, only loaded threads whose session cwd exactly matches this path are returned.

limit.description: Optional page size; defaults to no limit.

modelProviders.description: Optional provider filter; when set, only loaded threads whose current model provider matches one of these values are returned. When present but empty, includes all providers.

sourceKinds.description: Optional source filter; when set, only loaded threads from these source kinds are returned. When omitted or empty, defaults to interactive sources.
